title: Roly Santa Claus
description: Dive into the festive fun of Roly Santa Claus, an exciting online game designed for both kids and adults. Your mission: guide Santa on a thrilling adventure, rolling through challenges, collecting delightful gifts, and reaching the safety of the goal. Unleash your gaming spirit and enjoy the joyous journey. Let the rollicking good times begin!
instructions: A and D or Left and Right arrow to rotate the platform Use left mouse click to cut the rope
